description: Use this API to change the value of an integer ICON of the machine “other” model for a specified machine. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = change_cctmcnomod_icon(ibus, id, model, j, idata)
python_syntax: ierr = change_cctmcnomod_icon(ibus, id, model, j, idata)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Machine bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: j
parameters.description: Icon number to change (j is relative to the start of the block of icons assigned to this model, e,g., 1 for first icon(m), 2 for icon(m+1), etc.). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: idata
parameters.description: New icon value. (input; unchanged by default).

error_codes.description: no CCT table entry for the model.
model names do not match - model is aaa not xxx.
no ICONs used in the model.
ICON number outside of the ICON range of this model.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
